description: Phase 5D-1 onboarding: StackBuilder durable validation through controlled_compute. StackBuilder generates validation_run_id internally; controlled_compute discovers the new validation.json under project/output/validation/ after command success.

metadata.sidecar_coordination: StackBuilder generates validation run_id internally via generate_run_id('stackbuilder', 'run_directory'); controlled_compute discovers the new validation.json by snapshotting project/output/validation before the run and matching exactly one new validation.json after the run.
